title: Senior Doctor - Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Pune. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions:
Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ipca Laboratories Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
